experiment: M7 theta-sweep look-ahead LLM (frozen Qwen2.5-1.5B reads current-cell + theta-sweep look-ahead tokens, judges whether the path AHEAD is blocked in a NOVEL per-episode layout)
training: LoRA + gated fusion, 2800 steps, LR warmup 200 (convergence-hardened); balanced binary (chance 0.50)

off_text_only._desc: all spatial tokens zeroed (cortex ablated) -> the causal ON/OFF

no_sweep._desc: current-cell tokens kept, sweep tokens zeroed -> isolates the look-ahead

shuffled._desc: sweep tokens sampled along a WRONG heading (look-ahead, wrong direction)

decisive_contrast: ON vs NO-SWEEP (both carry the cortex/current cell; only the theta-sweep tokens differ): +27%, p=0.0081 (the n=8 sign-flip floor 2/2^8 -> ON > no-sweep in EVERY one of the 8 seeds)
unanimity: All three ablations are at the sign-flip floor p=0.0081 = 2/2^8: ON exceeds OFF, NO-SWEEP, and SHUFFLED in every one of the 8 seeds -- the effect is present in all seeds. The convergence-hardened config (2800 steps, warmup 200) fixed the pilot's stuck seeds (whose ON tied OFF at 0.50, giving the pilot's ON-vs-OFF p=0.030).
magnitude_vs_consistency: Versus the shorter 1600-step/120-warmup pilot (ON 0.82 +/-0.16; ON-vs-OFF p=0.030), the hardened run is MORE consistent (unanimous across all seeds; all p at the floor) but LOWER in magnitude (ON 0.68; decisive effect +27 vs the pilot's +34). Hardening traded peak accuracy for cross-seed robustness (likely mild overfitting at 2800 steps). The honest converged accuracy of this frozen-LLM+LoRA reader on this hard novel-layout binary task is ~68% -- modest (+18 over chance, +27 over the decisive sweep-ablated control), well below the dedicated CPU readout's 0.90, but robustly above chance and robustly sweep-dependent in every seed.
headline: A frozen LLM judges whether the path AHEAD is blocked in a NOVEL layout ONLY when given the theta-sweep look-ahead tokens: ON 68% vs sweep-ablated 41%, wrong-heading-shuffled 51%, text-only-OFF 44% (chance 50%). The effect is present in EVERY one of the 8 seeds (all ablations at the sign-flip floor p=0.0081). Modest in magnitude but robust across seeds -- the Vollan look-around, made load-bearing for language.
